title: PaymentOrder v1 — Lenh thanh toan di NHNN thu cong (TT.OUT.MANUAL)
description: Schema chuan cho LTT thu cong. Bao gom day du 57 truong tu man hinh S02, 36 quy tac VAL va cau truc COA segment.
$comment: Generated by SA Agent — Stage 2. Source: workspaces/ba/domain/screens.yaml + validation-rules.yaml + coa-segments.yaml

id.description: Khoa chinh LTT (UUID v4), do he thong sinh tu dong.

version.description: Phien ban ban ghi de optimistic lock (If-Match header). Tang 1 sau moi lan cap nhat.

status.description: Trang thai hien tai cua LTT theo state machine 15 trang thai. Tham chieu: states.yaml.

requestNumber.description: So YCTT / So but toan. Bat buoc nhap hoac tu sinh theo BIZ-IDGEN. Pattern LNH: ddMMyyyy + 6-digit seq. VAL-002, VAL-010, VAL-011. IMMUTABLE sau khi tao.

channel.description: Kenh thanh toan. LNH = Lien ngan hang, SP = Song phuong, LKB = Lien kho bac. Tham chieu DM-CHANNEL.

orderType.description: Loai lenh thanh toan. Vi du: OT-LNH-LCC, OT-SP-CK, OT-LKB-CK. Phai hop le theo ma tran Kenh x Loai lenh (coa-segments.yaml). Tham chieu DM-ORDER-TYPE.

transactionType.description: Loai giao dich. Chi hien thi khi Kenh = LNH. Vi du: TX-LCC, TX-LCT, TX-LNC, TX-LNT, TX-LCH, TX-LTC. Tham chieu DM-TXN-TYPE. Bat buoc khi kenh LNH (VAL-017).

senderBankCode.description: Ma NH/KB chuyen (8 ky tu BIN). Tu hien thi ma NH truc tiep cua user, khong cho sua. Tham chieu DM-BANK.

senderBankName.description: Ten NH/KB chuyen. Tu dong tra cuu tu DM-BANK.

receiverBankCode.description: Ma NH/KB nhan (8 ky tu BIN). Tham chieu DM-BANK. Phai khac senderBankCode (VAL-009).

receiverBankName.description: Ten NH/KB nhan. Tu dong tra cuu tu DM-BANK.

paymentDate.description: Ngay thanh toan. Tu hien thi ngay lam viec hien tai. Khong nho hon ngay lam viec (VAL-012). Khong roi vao ngay nghi/le (VAL-013).

amount.description: So tien chuyen. Phai > 0 (VAL-014). Precision: (15,2). Phai bang tong tien cac khoan muc (VAL-015). Kiem tra han muc (BIZ-LIMIT).

currency.description: Loai tien theo ISO-4217. Mac dinh VND. Tham chieu DM-CURRENCY.

exchangeRate.description: Ty gia. Bat buoc khi ngoai te (VAL-016). Kiem tra bien do +-2% (BIZ-FX-RATE).

originalDocNo.description: So chung tu goc. Bat buoc khi Kenh = SP (VAL-018).

originalDocDate.description: Ngay chung tu. Bat buoc khi Kenh = SP.

feeType.description: Loai phi: FE-OUR, FE-BEN, FE-SHA, FE-NONE, FE-NETOUT. Tham chieu DM-FEE-TYPE. Bat buoc khi Loai lenh = TT ngoai te khac.

debitCurrency.description: Ma ngoai te trich no. Tham chieu DM-CURRENCY. Bat buoc khi Loai lenh = TT ngoai te khac.

paymentCurrency.description: Ma ngoai te thanh toan. Tham chieu DM-CURRENCY. Bat buoc khi Loai lenh = TT ngoai te khac.

foreignAmount.description: So tien ngoai te thanh toan. Bat buoc khi Loai lenh = TT ngoai te khac.

paymentContent.description: Noi dung thanh toan. Bat buoc nhap (VAL-005). Toi da 500 ky tu (VAL-002).

makerId.description: Ma nguoi lap LTT. Tu dong lay user hien tai. IMMUTABLE. Tham gia SoD (BIZ-MAKER-CHECKER).

lineItems.description: Danh sach khoan muc COA chi tiet. It nhat 1 dong. Tong tien cac dong phai bang amount (VAL-015).

attachments.description: Danh sach tep dinh kem. Gioi han 10MB/file, dinh dang PDF/JPG/PNG/DOCX (VAL-029).

checkerId.description: Ma nguoi kiem soat. Khac Maker (SOD-001). Duoc gan khi Checker approve.

approverId.description: Ma nguoi phe duyet. Khac Checker va Maker (SOD-002, SOD-003).

signatureData.description: Du lieu chu ky so (XML/JSON da ky). Luu vao ECM.

signatureHash.description: Hash SHA-256 cua chu ky so.

signerCert.description: Chung thu so cua nguoi ky.

providerRefId.description: Ma tham chieu tu NHNN/NHTM/KB nhan (tra ve qua callback).

settlementDate.description: Ngay quyet toan tu NH/KB callback.

glVoucherNo.description: So chung tu GL sau khi hach toan thanh cong.

reversalOfId.description: ID cua LTT goc ma LTT nay dao (chi co khi status = REVERSED).

holdAmount.description: So tien giu quy (BIZ-RESERVE-FUND). Release khi Reject/Cancel/Delete (BIZ-RELEASE-HOLD).

rejectReason.description: Ly do tu choi/huy. Bat buoc khi Reject/Cancel, 10-500 ky tu (VAL-030, BIZ-REJECT-REASON).

isDeleted.description: Danh dau xoa mem (BIZ-DELETE-SOFT). True khi LTT da bi xoa.

deleteReason.description: Ly do xoa. Bat buoc >= 10 ky tu (VAL-030, BIZ-DELETE-DRAFT).

updatedAt.description: Thoi gian cap nhat cuoi cung.

auditHash.description: Hash kiem toan chuoi: hash_truoc + du lieu + thoi_gian -> SHA-256. Chong sua lui du lieu.

LineItem.title: Khoan muc COA chi tiet
LineItem.description: Moi dong khoan muc la mot to hop COA day du (11 segment). Tuong thuc theo BIZ-COA-CROSS.

fundCode.description: Ma quy (2 ky tu). Mac dinh 01. Tham chieu DM-MAQUY. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

naturalAccount.description: TK tu nhien (4 ky tu so). Tham chieu DM-TK. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

dvqhns.description: Don vi quan he ngan sach (7 ky tu so). Tham chieu DM-DVQHNS. VAL-001, VAL-020, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

budgetLevel.description: Cap ngan sach (1 ky tu). 1=TW, 2=Tinh, 3=Huyen, 4=Xa. Tham chieu DM-CAPNS. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

chapter.description: Chuong (3 ky tu so). Mac dinh 000. Tham chieu DM-CHUONG. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

economicSector.description: Nganh kinh te (3 ky tu so). Mac dinh 000. Tham chieu DM-NGANHKT. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

ndkt.description: Noi dung kinh te / Tieu muc (4 ky tu so). Mac dinh 0000. Tham chieu DM-NDKT. VAL-001, VAL-022, BIZ-COA-CROSS, BIZ-NDND-RULE.

area.description: Dia ban / Ma hanh chinh (5 ky tu so). Mac dinh 00000. Tham chieu DM-DIABAN. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

program.description: Chuong trinh muc tieu (5 ky tu so). Mac dinh 00000. Tham chieu DM-CTMT. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

fundSource.description: Ma nguon kinh phi (2 ky tu). Mac dinh 00. Tham chieu DM-MN. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

treasuryCode.description: Ma kho bac (4 ky tu). Mac dinh 0000. Tham chieu DM-KB. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

reserve.description: Ma du phong (3 ky tu). Mac dinh 000. Tham chieu DM-DP. VAL-001, BIZ-COA-CROSS.

description.description: Dien giai khoan muc. Bat buoc, toi da 250 ky tu (VAL-023).

itemAmount.description: So tien chi tiet tung dong khoan muc. Precision (15,2). Phai > 0 (VAL-014).

PartyInfo.title: Thong tin nguoi chuyen
PartyInfo.description: Thong tin nguoi chuyen tien (nhom 3 tu S02).

name.description: Ten nguoi chuyen. Bat buoc. Tu hien thi theo COA.

address.description: Dia chi nguoi chuyen. Bat buoc.

accountNumber.description: So tai khoan nguoi chuyen. Bat buoc. Tu hien thi theo COA. Kiem tra checksum (VAL-024).

bankCode.description: Ma NH/KB mo tai khoan. Tu hien thi ma NH cua user dang nhap. Tham chieu DM-BANK.

bankName.description: Ten NH/KB mo tai khoan. Tu dong tra cuu.

identityDoc.description: CMND (9 so) / CCCD (12 so) / HC / Ma DN (10-13 ky tu). VAL-025.

identityDocIssueDate.description: Ngay cap giay to. Bat buoc neu da nhap identityDoc (VAL-026).

identityDocIssuePlace.description: Noi cap giay to. Bat buoc neu da nhap identityDoc (VAL-026).

tpcpCode.description: Ma Trai phieu Chinh phu. Bat buoc khi Loai lenh = OT-SP-TPCP (VAL-027).

ReceiverInfo.title: Thong tin nguoi nhan
ReceiverInfo.description: Thong tin nguoi nhan tien (nhom 4 tu S02).

accountNumber.description: So tai khoan nguoi nhan. Bat buoc. Kiem tra checksum (VAL-024).

bankCode.description: Ma NH/KB mo tai khoan nguoi nhan. Bat buoc. Tham chieu DM-BANK.

bankName.description: Ten NH/KB mo tai khoan nguoi nhan.

accountName.description: Ten tai khoan nguoi nhan. Bat buoc.

identityDoc.description: CMND (9 so) / CCCD (12 so) / HC / Ma DN (10-13 ky tu). VAL-025.

identityDocIssueDate.description: Ngay cap giay to nguoi nhan. Bat buoc neu da nhap identityDoc (VAL-026).

identityDocIssuePlace.description: Noi cap giay to nguoi nhan. Bat buoc neu da nhap identityDoc (VAL-026).

Attachment.title: Tep dinh kem
Attachment.description: Chung tu dinh kem kem LTT. Gioi han 10MB/file, dinh dang PDF/JPG/PNG/DOCX (VAL-029).

contentType.description: Dinh dang file. Chi chap nhan PDF/JPG/PNG/DOCX (VAL-029).

ecmDocId.description: Ma tai lieu ECM sau khi luu tru thanh cong.
